design_philosophy: Minimalist, Premium, professional, and clean UI. Think premium Indian fintech meets minimal Swiss design. No dead UI, zero tolerance for white/black screens. Cross-platform mobile feel.

typography.font_install_instructions: Import Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare and Manrope from Google Fonts via CSS @import.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen relative pb-20 (to account for sticky bottom nav)

bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center h-16 pb-safe z-50

cards.voucher_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden
cards.membership_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 to-slate-800 text-white rounded-2xl p-5 border border-slate-700 relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: w-full bg-emerald-900 hover:bg-emerald-800 text-white font-medium rounded-full py-3.5 transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-800 font-medium rounded-full py-3.5 transition-transform active:scale-95 hover:bg-slate-50
buttons.danger: w-full bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-100 font-medium rounded-full py-3.5 active:scale-95

inputs.search: bg-slate-100 border-transparent rounded-full px-4 py-3 w-full focus:bg-white focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200 transition-all text-sm
inputs.pin_input: w-14 h-14 text-center text-2xl font-bold bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200

modals.bottom_sheet: bg-white rounded-t-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto z-[60]

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Use regular weight for general UI, duotone for premium embellishments)
testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

avatar_profile.description: Elegant portrait of a young male professional in a suit. Use for the top-right profile avatar.

premium_texture.description: Gold metallic foil texture. Use as a subtle background or badge accent for the ₹99 Premium Membership.

brand_logo_1.description: Miniso store sign. Use as a sample image for retail/asset vouchers.

brand_logo_2.description: Neon swan sign. Use as a sample image for premium/luxury brand vouchers.

specific_flow_guidelines.pin_screen: Minimalist layout. Large numbers. Use a keypad grid. Empty state for dots should be subtle border circles, filled state should be solid emerald circles.
specific_flow_guidelines.home_feed: Prioritize 'Ending Soon' cards at the top with a distinct red/terracotta subtle alert tint. Followed by a smart search bar.
specific_flow_guidelines.my_coupons: Tabs should be pill-shaped under a sticky header. 'Add New' should trigger a bottom sheet modal.
specific_flow_guidelines.reward_circle: Use a subtle pattern or the gold premium texture for the share card. Must look exclusive.
